name: DiagGetDTC
syntax: long DiagGetDTC(byte statusMask, dword[] dtcList, byte& count);
description: Reads all DTCs (Diagnostic Trouble Codes) matching the given status mask.
Use 0xFF for 'all DTCs' or specific bit patterns like 0x08 (confirmed).

parameters.name: dtcList
parameters.description: Pre-allocated array (typically size 64) to receive DTCs

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Output: number of DTCs actually returned

return: 0 on success, <0 on error (e.g. -1 = no response, -2 = NRC 0x14 = responseTooLong)
note: Result is async; check via Diag_GetDTCResponse callback if using raw API.
